MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-12-2007 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Ernest Halperin, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Robert Cole is present.
Howard Newson Chung appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Julie McHone is present.
Melvin Caesar Belli representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties did not check in at Dept. 206. This case settled per Judge Pro Tem Ernest Halperin. The trial date of September 17, 2007 is vacated.
